scripts.helper:build: swift build --package-path mac-helper --cache-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/cache --config-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/config --security-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/security --manifest-cache local --scratch-path mac-helper/.build -Xswiftc -module-cache-path -Xswiftc mac-helper/.build/module-cache -Xcc -fmodules-cache-path=mac-helper/.build/clang-module-cache
scripts.helper:run: swift run --package-path mac-helper --cache-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/cache --config-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/config --security-path mac-helper/.swiftpm/security --manifest-cache local --scratch-path mac-helper/.build -Xswiftc -module-cache-path -Xswiftc mac-helper/.build/module-cache -Xcc -fmodules-cache-path=mac-helper/.build/clang-module-cache
